artifacts.name: MechaShell (lean DC)
artifacts.summary: Servidor MCP enxuto de 6 tools (run/read/write/edit/ls/find); ~448 tokens de schema vs ~5920 do Desktop Commander (-92%); paridade funcional 10/10.

artifacts.name: skill mecha-shell
artifacts.summary: Guia de uso enxuto do MechaShell com progressive disclosure (nao pesa no schema).

artifacts.name: skill host-bridge-diagnostics
artifacts.summary: Ponte sandbox->host via Desktop Commander; verifica o Gemeo Digital; v2 enumera candidatos e checa 3 causas de grafo vazio.

artifacts.name: skill daemonize
artifacts.summary: Transforma agendamento (cron) em daemon resiliente; bundle do mecha_daemon.py.

artifacts.name: mecha_daemon.py
artifacts.summary: Motor de daemon: lockfile single-instance, fail-closed, backoff, heartbeat/status, shutdown gracioso.

artifacts.name: cost_monitor daemon
artifacts.summary: Monitora o custo de tokens do MechaShell a cada 6h; loga em cost_log.csv e avisa no plato.

artifacts.name: digital_twin_monitor daemon
artifacts.summary: Monitor continuo do Neo4j; alerta grafo zerado / twin parado / transicao para zero; status.json p/ o painel Electron.

artifacts.name: INTEGRACAO_RAGDOJO_OMEGA_MECHA
artifacts.summary: Pipeline de graduacao rag-dojo->Omega/Mecha; padroniza Qdrant+Neo4j; clean-room preservado; validado 100% pelo dynamic_typing.

artifacts.name: Finding: o twin real e mecha_ontology_graph
artifacts.summary: cdc_neo4j esta vazio e sem volume; o Gemeo Digital real e mecha_ontology_graph (349 nos, 24 labels, volume nomeado infrastructure_neo4j_data) - dar docker start, NAO re-ingerir.

artifacts.name: Finding: drift id vs qdrant_id
artifacts.summary: Ingester canonico e dorkling_ingestion; scripts antigos buscam qdrant_id (sondas descartaveis); mecha-qdrant/omega_qdrant tem ~75 pontos.
